since_last: 38% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.11%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -1.65% · Gold +1.36% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 38% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.11%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.11%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +14.39%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +14.39%, MU +13.91%, TER +12.10%, KLAC +7.88%, LRCX +7.49%. Laggards: INOD -10.18%, PUBM -6.71%, AI -6.44%, MGNI -6.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.05% at $152.92
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
